name: dev-flow-skills
description: Governed development-flow skills for AI coding agents with intent routing, debugging, UI/UX, review, planning, execution, Git safety, acceptance, and independent CR.

interface.shortDescription: Intent-routed planning, execution, Git safety, acceptance, and independent CR
interface.longDescription: Use Dev Flow Skills to route development requests by intent, then guide debugging, UI/UX work, review, clarification, formal planning documents, task orchestration, continuous execution, Git safety, final acceptance evidence, and independent post-acceptance CR.
defaultPrompt: Use dev-flow to route and handle this development request.
Run a governed dev-flow for this project change.
Use dev-flow to debug this failure and verify the fix.
Use dev-flow-cr to review the current diff after acceptance.
